## Acknowledgments

[To be completed by investigators.]

## Funding

[To be completed.]

## Conflict of Interest

[To be completed.]

## Data Availability

De-identified data may be made available upon reasonable request to the corresponding author and subject to institutional approval.

## Author Contributions

[To be completed.]

## References

1. Doroshow DB, Galsky MD, Marron TU, et al. Protocol STUDY-21-001175, version 3.0 (22 May 2023). Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai.  
2. Tran M, et al. [Pro-tumorigenic inflammation / urothelial carcinoma translational study; PMC13069984](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC13069984/).  
3. Ridker PM, et al. CANTOS trial. *Lancet*. 2017.  
4. CheckMate 274: adjuvant nivolumab in high-risk urothelial carcinoma.  

---
